rationale: Gov't Code §2256.005 governs public investment policies and investment officer designation for investing entities. It is unrelated to property tax homestead exemptions under Tax Code §11.13(b). No conflict exists.
quote: The governing body of an investing entity shall adopt by rule, order, ordinance, or resolution, as appropriate, a written investment policy regarding the investment of its funds and funds under its control.
_note: Rule text concerns public funds investment management; proposed homestead exemption change does not intersect with this statute.
